2256340.name: Final Remedy
2256340.description:
Overview

Final Remedy is an atmospheric, story-rich walking simulator with some puzzle elements and crafting mechanics. Solve the mystery, survive, avoid the enemies, or defeat them and escape!

Story

"It's cold! I'm cold! I am very cold! Is that snow?
Where am I? Who am I? How did I get here?"

You wake up in an unfamiliar place, with no memory of how you got there or who you are.

Your first priority is to figure out where you are and why you're there. As you begin to unravel the mystery of your surroundings, you'll realize that your only hope of escape is to find a way out of this strange world. But it won't be easy – you'll need to use all your wits and resources to survive and find your way home.
